title: L2: Binary and Denary
description: Converting binary to denary and denary to binary using 8-bit place values.

steps.title: Do Now Activity
steps.content:
Do Now Activity

Quick check from binary place values.
steps.js: BinaryLesson.createPractice({containerId:'y9bd-dna',questions:[{prompt:'What is this worth?',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,0,0,0,0,0,1]),answer:'129',right:'128 + 1 = 129.'},{prompt:'What is this worth?',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,1,0,0,0,0,0]),answer:'96',right:'64 + 32 = 96.'},{prompt:'Build 16, 8 and 4 as binary.',answer:'00011100',right:'Correct.'}]});

steps.title: Step Through: Binary to Denary
steps.content: Step through binary to denary
steps.js:
BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9bd-stepper-1',steps:[{title:'We are converting 01101100 to denary',html:'
01101100
',note:'Find which columns have a 1, then add their place values together.'},{title:'Line each bit up under its place value',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([0,1,1,0,1,1,0,0]),note:'The bright cells show the 1s. The active columns are 64, 32, 8 and 4.'},{title:'Add the active columns',html:'

64 + 32 + 8 + 4 = 108

',note:'01101100 in denary is 108.'}]});

steps.title: Step Through: Denary to Binary
steps.content: Step through denary to binary
steps.js:
BinaryLesson.createStepper({containerId:'y9bd-stepper-2',steps:[{title:'We are converting 150 to binary',html:'
150
',note:'Go column by column from left to right. At each column, ask: does this value fit in what I have left? If yes, write a 1 and subtract it. If no, write a 0 and move on.'},{title:'Check each column',html:'
ColumnDoes it fit?Left over
128Yes — 150 ≥ 12822
64No — 22 < 6422
32No — 22 < 3222
16Yes — 22 ≥ 166
8No — 6 < 86
4Yes — 6 ≥ 42
2Yes — 2 ≥ 20
1No — 0 left0
',note:'Each time a column fits, subtract it from what is left over. When the left over hits 0, all remaining columns get a 0.'},{title:'Read off the binary number',html:BinaryLesson.bitTable([1,0,0,1,0,1,1,0]),note:'Columns that fitted get a 1, the rest get a 0. 150 in binary is 10010110.'}]});
